headline: Northrop Grumman Backs Space Interceptor Push With Self Funded Test
summary: Northrop Grumman (NYSE:NOC) is partnering with Apex to advance space based interceptor technology for missile defense. The company is also independently funding a major on orbit demonstration for the U.S. Space Force, targeting a 2027 timeline. The initiative aligns with U.S. government goals to speed up the development and deployment of next generation space defense capabilities. Northrop Grumman is a large U.S. defense contractor with a long history in space, missile defense, and...
